blocks.text:
To: Robert Smith
Cc: Kimberly Le
Robert, a short status on where the {{fact:f:E-2024-001.client}} reputation audit stands, and one thing we could use from your side to keep it moving.

Kimberly Le has been through the bulk of the public record now, the coverage and the analyst notes and the transcripts of your last several calls, and a first shape is coming through. The operating story reads clearly and consistently. The capital-and-strategy story is where the outside read starts to part from what we understand to be true, and that is the part worth getting right before anything goes into the findings.

What would help now is access to your two most recent earnings calls and any investor decks from the past year that are not already public, so Kimberly is testing the read against your own materials and not just the market's version of them. If it is easier to point us to someone on your team who holds those, that works just as well. Nothing here is a conclusion yet, so this is exactly the moment to steer it if the emphasis feels off to you.
